page: Vultr vcg-a40-8c-40g-16vram is a virtual machine instance belonging to the Cloud GPU family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and features 8 shared Intel vCPUs. The system is provisioned with 40.0 GB of system memory, which translates to an allocation of 5.0 GB of RAM per virtual core.

For hardware acceleration, the instance includes a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, representing a 0.3333 slice of the physical GPU, which provides 16 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is supported by a 740 GB NVMe SSD, delivering high-speed read and write performance. Additionally, the instance comes with 1 complimentary public IPv4 address.

By utilizing a fractional GPU architecture, this server offers a qualitative cost-efficiency advantage for projects that require GPU acceleration but do not demand the full compute capacity or memory bandwidth of an entire A40 card. This resource density makes it a practical choice for workloads such as mid-range machine learning inference, data science prototyping, video transcoding, and CUDA-based application development.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-8c-40g-16vram is a fractional GPU instance within the Cloud GPU family, designed to provide balanced compute and graphics acceleration. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 8 shared Intel vCPUs, 40.0 GB of system memory, and a 740 GB NVMe SSD for high-speed local storage. The server is equipped with a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU (0.3333 allocation) that delivers 16 GB of dedicated VRAM. This configuration offers a cost-effective entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads by partitioning a high-end enterprise GPU. It is appropriate for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science prototyping, video encoding, and general-purpose CUDA development where a full dedicated GPU is not required.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a40-8c-40g-16vram is a Cloud GPU instance featuring 8 shared Intel vCPUs, 40 GB RAM, a 740 GB NVMe SSD, and a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-a40-8c-40g-16vram is a Cloud GPU instance with 8 shared Intel vCPUs, 40 GB RAM, 740 GB NVMe SSD, and a fractional NVIDIA A40 GPU with 16 GB VRAM.
tagline: A fractional GPU instance combining shared Intel processors, high-speed NVMe storage, and dedicated NVIDIA Ampere acceleration for cost-effective parallel computing.
bullet_points: Fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 16 GB of dedicated VRAM
8 shared Intel x86_64 vCPUs with 40.0 GB of system memory
740 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Optimized for machine learning inference, data science, and video transcoding
